title: Consciousness As Sky
definition: The idea that consciousness is a vast, boundless expanse in which thoughts and sensations arise and pass away.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A metaphor for the nature of consciousness as a vast space where thoughts and feelings come and go.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An analogy that posits consciousness as an unchanging, all-encompassing background upon which the ever-changing stream of thoughts and sensations unfolds.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical perspective likening consciousness to a vast, ever-present sky within which thoughts and sensory experiences arise and dissolve.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that consciousness is not limited by the thoughts and emotions that arise within it
